name: conductor-parity-matrix-smoke
description: Read-only local benchmark suite for parity fixture coverage, workflow templates, saved workflow commands, and benchmark provenance templates. This validates evidence machinery; it is not a live Conductor-vs-Ultracode result.

tasks.description: The local doctor exposes explicit companion-host diagnostics and approval-gated repair without mutating the installation during smoke validation.
The staged implementation CLI exposes explicit verified-stage process exit semantics while retaining strict behavior by default.
The staged repair CLI exposes the same explicit verified-stage process exit semantics for a retained cumulative patch.
The pinned Claude Sonnet staged adapter exposes the explicit one-command verified apply transaction.
The direct Codex staged adapter exposes the explicit one-command verified apply transaction.
The Codex staged repair adapter exposes the explicit one-command verified apply transaction.

The legacy v2 public campaign schema remains available for immutable fixed-effort evidence.
The legacy public campaign schema remains available and keeps its Codex lane fixed to ultra for immutable v1 evidence.
